name: repogent
description: Turn bounded Python changes into independently validated, approval-ready patches.

interface.shortDescription: From issue to independently verified patch
interface.longDescription: Analyze a Python change request, validate bounded patch candidates, preserve three explicit approval gates, and retain local evidence.
defaultPrompt: Use Repogent to make this Python change safely and show me the exact patch before applying it.
Prepare an independently validated patch for this issue.
